name: viem

auth.notes: API key for RPC provider; private key or wallet connector for signing

performance.notes: RPC call latency depends on provider; modular tree-shaking keeps bundle small

agent_readiness.notes: Modern TypeScript-first Ethereum library, successor to ethers.js. Excellent TypeScript types including ABI-typed contract interaction. Tree-shakeable. Highly readable error messages. Public client (read-only), wallet client (signing), test client (hardhat/anvil). wagmi integration for React. Used by major DeFi protocols and the most popular new choice for TypeScript Web3 development.

gotchas: Newer library — less Stack Overflow answers than ethers.js
Breaking changes between v1 and v2 required migration
Some older tutorials still use ethers.js patterns
best_when: TypeScript-first Ethereum/EVM development (best TS types available)
New projects choosing between ethers.js and viem (viem recommended)
Smart contract testing with anvil/hardhat test client
avoid_when: Legacy codebases already using ethers.js (migration cost)
summary: viem is the modern TypeScript-first Ethereum library and successor to ethers.js. Exceptional TypeScript types with ABI-typed contract interaction. Highly readable error messages. Tree-shakeable. Public, wallet, and test client architecture. Integrates with wagmi for React. Now the recommended choice for new TypeScript Ethereum projects. Excellent developer experience.
